title: boschia griffithii
intro: Boschia griffithii is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae, native to the subtropical and tropical regions of Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Boschia griffithii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and bark are also used in traditional medicine.
